loadingTips: TAP and HOLD a Skill Card|to see more details
TAP and HOLD a Skill Card|to see more details
WATER is strong against|FIRE and DARK
EARTH is strong against|WATER and ELECTRIC
FIRE is strong against|EARTH and ELECTRIC
DARK is strong against|FIRE and EARTH
ELECTRIC is strong against|WATER and DARK
Under HYPNO, Dynamons may attack themselves
When SICK, Dynamons suffer damage each turn
Use ITEMS during battles to gain the upper hand
Use ITEMS during battles to gain the upper hand

RAGE gives a major boost to the next attack

content.text: Welcome to CAMP DYNAMONS!
Did you come here to become|a Dynamon Captain?
Let's start by testing your SKILLS!
NICE! you have great potential.|Now choose your own Dynamon!
Great choice, you will make a great team!
Now, I have something to give you...
These ITEMS will be useful in your journey.
Speaking of which,|let's find a WILD DYNAMON...
Let's find some wild|Dynamons to BATTLE!
WAIT! Now that it's weak, let's|try to CATCH it!
WOW! Your Dynamon can LEVEL UP!
We use SHARDS to do that.|Use some now!
You can SWITCH Dynamons during battle.
Let's use the Duxedo you just caught!
That's Patrik, he also trains in the Camp...
Go and BATTLE him!
During battles, you can use one ITEM per turn.
Use the SKILL CAN you just got!
INTRUDER ALERT! INTRUDER ALERT!
Oh NO! Looks like someone has|broken into the camp.
Go on and meet Chuk. Stay SHARP!
Dynamons and Skills have TYPES...
Use the STRONG type when possible!
There! That must be the intruder!
Hello there, my name is Klaude.|I came here for a reason.
For years, humans were too COWARD to|unleash the true POTENTIAL of Dynamons!
But I - I seek a POWER that is far GREATER!
Let's see how you handle one of my GUARDS!
Very well, you've won - but think of|the POWER you are being DENIED!
Ah, you cannot understand...|No matter, I must leave. Goodbye.
All this talk about POWER...|I don't like the sound of that.
Hey LOOK! Klaude left something behind!
That KEY!|It must be the reason Klaude came here!
There's an expert in River Falls who could|tell us what it is. Will you visit him?
GOOD! Take care of yourself and|your Dynamons. Your journey BEGINS!
The ONLINE ARENA is now OPEN!
You can now fight other Captains LIVE!
Great, you made it to River Falls!|Find Dom, he might know more about the KEY.
Hey, you! You're a Dynamon Captain, right?
Some men came to the village who are|up to no good! Please help us drive them away!
I assume you came here to find Dom.|I did, too. I believe he has what I seek.
Unfortunately, by the time you'll reach him,|it will be TOO LATE.
GUARD! Take care of this child!
Wow, you did it! Thank you so much!|But now the village lost ELECTRICITY!
It could be an issue in the Solar Power Plant.|Will you take a look?
Great! Visit the Power Plant|when you get the chance!
Oh, YOU again. I admire your determination.|However, you are too late indeed.
Dom is in the cave... with my GUARDS.|He WILL give us the answers we seek.
In the meantime, my guard here|will keep you BUSY!
Fine! Have it your way.|We have what we came for.
So long, child!
Took you long enough to get rid of those GOONS!|In MY days, I could do it a lot FASTER!
You must have questions about|that KEY you carry, right?
Before I can tell you, I need to|test your skills in BATTLE!
Come back when you can defeat me.|I will tell you what I know then.
Very good, you were trained well.|You will need that facing Klaude.
You see, a LEGEND tells of a STRONG DYNAMON|that once roamed the land.
It's name was Zenix.
Zenix was so POWERFUL, it terrified humans.|It had to be STOPPED, they decided.
And so, a brave young boy approached Zenix.|After a tough battle, he was able to capture it.
To ensure no one could use it's power,|it was locked behind SIX KEYS.
You have ONE of those keys.|And I... I have ANOTHER!
Keep this key with you.|Find the other FOUR keys.
You must do this before Klaude does.|Who knows what he will do with such POWER!
So Klaude wants to release Zenix|using the SIX KEYS!
I got a call from my archaeologist friend,|DR SWAN. She found something interesting!
I think you should check it out.|Meet with her in the Temple Ruins!
Hey, you made it to the Power Plant!
The village lost electricity.|There must be some problem here...
I'll tell you the problem, lady!|This Power Plant is now OURS!
All electricity is now managed by Gang Zero!
Oh NO! We must get rid of the gang|in order to restore the power!
You're just wasting your time...|No way you can defeat us all!
Don't mind him - keep going!|You're doing an INCREDIBLE job!
Haha! Gang Zero won't go down that easily!
My Electric Dynamons are all|CHARGED UP and READY!
HA! The Power Plant is ours|until you can beat me!
Fine! You win this time.|But you will meet Gang Zero again!
AMAZING! You saved the Power Plant!
The village now has electricity again!|THANK YOU!
Welcome to the ONLINE ARENA!|First, let's set up your profile.
YAY! Now you can prove your skills|against other players ONLINE!
Earn TROPHIES in RANDOM BATTLES or|by playing against YOUR FRIENDS.
Good luck, I'll be cheering for you!
Hey, are you the one Jovani told me about?|Thank you for coming here so fast!
